package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesHttpClientPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_allocates_http_client_per_request"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "HTTP client allocated inside Gin handlers or middleware instead of being shared."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
